title: Johnson & Johnson Launches VARIPULSE Pro in Europe
text: Johnson & Johnson announced the European launch of VARIPULSE Pro after CE Mark approval, expanding its pulsed field ablation portfolio for cardiac procedures. VARIPULSE Pro introduces a new pulse sequence designed to improve workflow efficiency while reinforcing the platform's safety and effectiveness profile. The company said the new sequence has a lower temperature profile and delivers an ablation five times faster than the prior sequence while achieving equivalent lesions. This news is relevant because MedTech is one of J&J's two main business segments, and cardiovascular/electrophysiology technologies are important growth areas. For investment and RAG analysis, the launch shows that J&J is not only relying on pharmaceutical growth but is also advancing medical technology platforms that can support procedure adoption, hospital demand, and long-term segment growth.
